personal.name: Sameer Khan
personal.title: Full Stack Developer (MERN)
personal.subtitle: MERN Stack Developer & Software Engineer
personal.description: I craft beautiful, functional, and user-centered digital experiences. Passionate about clean code, modern design, and cutting-edge technologies.
personal.objective: Seeking a challenging Full Stack Developer role where I can apply my 1+ years of expertise in high-performance MERN technologies, real-time systems (Socket.io), and AI integrations (OpenAI/LangChain) to drive innovation and organizational growth.
personal.summary: Full Stack Developer with 1+ year of professional experience building high-performance, scalable web applications using MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js) and Next.js. Expertise in microservices architecture, real-time systems using Socket.io and WebRTC, and cloud deployment on AWS. Proven track record of reducing API response times by 40%, handling 10,000+ concurrent users, and integrating AI solutions using LangChain and OpenAI API. Founder of Codingyari — a tech platform with 10+ production apps and open-source developer tools

description: Architected and deployed 5+ scalable microservices using Node.js, reducing API response time by 40% and improving system reliability to 99.9% uptime
Built real-time collaborative features using Socket.io and Redis, supporting 10,000+ concurrent users with sub-100ms latency
Developed RESTful APIs with comprehensive authentication (JWT, OAuth 2.0) and role-based access control
Optimized MongoDB queries and implemented Redis caching strategy, reducing database load by 50% and improving page load times by 35%
Integrated AI chatbot using LangChain and OpenAI API, handling 100+ customer queries daily with 85% satisfaction rate
Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and deployed on AWS (EC2, S3), reducing deployment time by 70%
Developed VS Code extensions (console-debug-pro, Node.js Snippets) with 150+ combined downloads
Mentored 3 junior developers in React.js, Node.js, and software design patterns

projects.title: OpenTalk
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Language Learning Platform
projects.description: Developed a real-time language learning platform enabling users to create and join customizable conversation rooms. Integrated Redis for efficient session handling and scalable real-time communication across multiple users.
highlights: Real-time messaging and voice/video rooms using Socket.io + WebRTC
Redis-based session handling for 100+ concurrent users
Secure JWT authentication with role-based access control

projects.title: GitProfileX
projects.subtitle: AI-Generated Developer Portfolio
projects.description: Developed a dynamic portfolio generator using GitHub username. Integrates GitHub API to display repositories, stats, languages, and profile insights with live synchronization. AI-powered bio and project descriptions using OpenAI API.
highlights: Live GitHub API sync for repos, stats and language breakdown
AI-generated portfolio content using OpenAI API
Zustand state management for seamless UX

projects.title: URL Shortener Platform
projects.subtitle: Full Stack Web Application
projects.description: Transform long URLs into short, shareable links with real-time analytics. Manage, track, and analyze link performance. Secured with Google OAuth 2.0 authentication to prevent unauthorized access.
highlights: Sub-100ms redirection with 40% improved link tracking efficiency
Reduced unauthorized access by 99.9% via Google OAuth
Real-time analytics dashboard for link performance

projects.title: IChaty
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Chat Application
projects.description: Developed a web-based, WhatsApp-like chat application with QR-based login, real-time messaging, group chats, broadcast messages, and status updates. Built responsive chat UI with real-time message updates using Socket.io and managed chat histories efficiently using Redux.

features.title: Clean Code
features.description: Writing maintainable and scalable code following best practices and design patterns.

features.title: Performance
features.description: Building fast, optimized applications with Redis caching, API optimization, and CDN integration.

features.title: Problem Solving
features.description: Turning complex challenges into elegant solutions with real-time systems and AI integration.
